name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
creator: Anthropic
description: Claude 3.5 Sonnet excels at nuanced reasoning, multi-step problem-solving, and code generation, making it a strong contender for complex agentic workflows. Its balanced performance and increased speed foster rapid developer adoption, especially for long-context tasks requiring deep understanding and robust output.

name: GPT-4o
creator: OpenAI
description: GPT-4o is optimized for multimodal interactions and real-time responsiveness, integrating seamlessly into autonomous agents requiring vision, audio, and text understanding. Its speed and strong tool-use capabilities drive high adoption in applications needing dynamic interaction and efficient workflow orchestration.

name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
creator: Google
description: Gemini 1.5 Pro stands out with its massive context window, enabling ingestion and reasoning over entire codebases, legal documents, or video archives. This makes it ideal for repository ingestion and long-form analysis, empowering agents with unparalleled access to information for complex tasks.

name: DeepSeek-V3
creator: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek-V3 offers a strong balance of advanced reasoning and cost-effectiveness for an open model, making it highly attractive for developers building scalable agentic systems. Its performance in logical reasoning and coding tasks, coupled with its flexible licensing, fosters widespread community adoption.

name: Llama 3.1 405B
creator: Meta
description: Llama 3.1 405B is Meta's flagship open-source model, designed for on-premise deployment and fine-tuning, offering state-of-the-art performance for custom agent solutions. Its vast parameter count enables sophisticated reasoning and extensive knowledge retention, serving as a powerful foundation for enterprise-level AI.

name: Qwen 2.5 72B
creator: Alibaba
description: Qwen 2.5 72B is a versatile open model excelling in multilingual tasks and complex logical deductions, making it suitable for agents operating in diverse global contexts. Its strong performance and growing community support establish it as a robust option for various autonomous workflows, especially those with diverse language requirements.

name: Mistral Large 2
creator: Mistral
description: Mistral Large 2 focuses on delivering top-tier performance for deep autonomous tasks, balancing efficiency with advanced reasoning capabilities. Its European roots and strong emphasis on data privacy make it a preferred choice for agents in regulated industries, driving significant adoption in enterprise environments.

name: Claude 4.8 Opus (Next-Gen)
creator: Anthropic
description: Claude 4.8 Opus represents the next generation of Anthropic's flagship model, offering unparalleled reasoning and context understanding for highly complex, multi-agent orchestrations. Its enhanced capabilities in long-context ingestion and robust tool use position it as a leader for future-proof autonomous systems.

name: GPT-5.5 (Next-Gen)
creator: OpenAI
description: GPT-5.5 sets a new standard for AI model performance, pushing boundaries in autonomous agent reasoning, long-context ingestion, and complex tool-use. Its advanced architecture delivers state-of-the-art results across diverse benchmarks, making it the premier choice for cutting-edge AI applications and groundbreaking research.

name: DeepSeek-R1
creator: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek-R1 is an open-source powerhouse, challenging proprietary models with its exceptional reasoning capabilities and coding prowess. Designed for advanced autonomous agents, it offers a robust, cost-effective, and transparent alternative for developers seeking high-performance solutions without vendor lock-in.
